channel.title: Redmi K60 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi K60 MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI V14.0.23.1.30.DEV Fastboot update for Redmi K60 China
item.description:
New Public Beta Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi K60 China

Codename: mondrian

Version: V14.0.23.1.30.DEV | 13.0

Size: 7.4 GB

MD5: 4c814db3668b404a92e70455a9cd3358

Changelog:
Bug fixes and system optimizations.

Download: Here
